response.justification: While Sarah demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and appropriate seniority level as a Staff Engineer, the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, and AI accelerator optimization that is entirely absent from her background. Her career trajectory has been exclusively in web, backend, and full-stack software development with no evidence of hardware systems design, performance profiling for accelerators, or deep-learning workload optimization—all core requirements for this principal-level position.
strengths: Strong seniority level and full-stack engineering depth across multiple platforms and languages
Demonstrated expertise in performance optimization and low-latency systems from backend infrastructure work
Leadership capability through mentoring, teaching, and infrastructure work at multiple organizations
concerns: No experience with SoC or IP modeling, a stated required skill for the role
Career background entirely in software/web development with no hardware architecture or AI accelerator optimization experience
Missing foundational knowledge in deep-learning workloads, GPU architecture, and SIMD/MIMD systems required for this position
